case_title: ELIZABETH ANDERSON RESPONDENT VS. MARIPOSA CAFE APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT MARIPOSA CAFE AS TO RESPONDENT ANDERSON, ELIZABETH HEARING SET FOR DEC-13-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 818599
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2006 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2006 BY PRO TEM JUDGE GLENN A. LERNER (D-525).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2006 - JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT ELIZABETH ANDERSON AND AGAINST APPELLANT MARIPOSA CAFE IN THE AMOUNT OF $420.00 PRINCIPAL, $0.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $0.00 COSTS, $0.00 OTHER COSTS, FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $420.00. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. PRO TEM JUDGE GLENN S. LERNER; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525).

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR TRIAL DE NOVO ON WEDNESDAY, DEC-13-2006: RESPONDENT ELIZABETH ANDERSON APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA THIS DATE; MADELEINE L. MYERS, ESQ. OF THE LAW OFFICES OF DORIS A. SQUERI, 2107 NORTH FIRST STREET, STE. 640, SAN JOSE, CA 95131 (408.453.8878; FAX: 800.5166293) APPEARS FOR APPELLANT MARIPOSA CAFE; MR. JACK HOM APPEARS THIS DAY WITH COUNSEL MYERS AS A ONE-HALF OWNER OF THE MARIPOSA CAFE

BOTH SIDES SIGN THE STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM THIS DATE; THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO THE PARTIES AND TO ANY PROSPECTIVE WITNESSES. THE COURT ENTERTAINS ORAL TESTIMONY BY BOTH SIDES IN THE CAUSE AND RECEIVES, READS AND REVIEWS SUBMITTED DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE THAT IS PRESENTED TO THE COURT THIS DATE.
11:12am: Mr. Karl Schreiber, previously sworn and still under oath, appears on behalf of Appellant Mariposa Cafe and makes statements to the Court this day.
11:19AM: THEREUPON, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. COUNSEL AND PARTIES ARE ADVISED THEY WILL BE NOTIFIED BY MAIL OF THE COURT'S DECISION.

PRO TEM JUDGE GLENN A. LERNER; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525).
